assertions.description: The li-ion cell monitor PCB (78x26mm, 2-layer) is correctly reported as routing_complete=True with 0 unrouted nets. The DFM analysis correctly grades it 'standard' tier with min_track_width=0.2mm, min_drill=0.4mm, and 0 violations. The thermal analysis correctly identifies the ESP-WROOM-32 module thermal pad (U2 pad 39, 6x6mm, 36mm²) with 25 nearby thermal vias.
